'''âs-l-j-b''' ('''kasaljeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:folly|folly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-l-j-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:folly|folly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-l-j-b
|-
! Lemma
| kasaljeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisaljeboko|thisaljeboko]] || [[word:jisaljeboko|jisaljeboko]] || [[word:shisaljeboko|shisaljeboko]] || [[word:kisaljeboko|kisaljeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusaljeboko|thuthusaljeboko]] || [[word:jujusaljeboko|jujusaljeboko]] || [[word:shushusaljeboko|shushusaljeboko]] || [[word:kukusaljeboko|kukusaljeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusaljeboko|thusaljeboko]] || [[word:jusaljeboko|jusaljeboko]] || [[word:shusaljeboko|shusaljeboko]] || [[word:kusaljeboko|kusaljeboko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusaljeboko|thusaljeboko]] || [[word:jusaljeboko|jusaljeboko]] || [[word:shusaljeboko|shusaljeboko]] || [[word:kusaljeboko|kusaljeboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesaljeboko|thesaljeboko]] || [[word:jesaljeboko|jesaljeboko]] || [[word:shesaljeboko|shesaljeboko]] || [[word:kesaljeboko|kesaljeboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosaljeboko|thothosaljeboko]] || [[word:jojosaljeboko|jojosaljeboko]] || [[word:shoshosaljeboko|shoshosaljeboko]] || [[word:kokosaljeboko|kokosaljeboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosaljeboko|thosaljeboko]] || [[word:josaljeboko|josaljeboko]] || [[word:shosaljeboko|shosaljeboko]] || [[word:kosaljeboko|kosaljeboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosaljeboko|thosaljeboko]] || [[word:josaljeboko|josaljeboko]] || [[word:shosaljeboko|shosaljeboko]] || [[word:kosaljeboko|kosaljeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsaljeboko|thĂŠsaljeboko]] || [[word:jĂŠsaljeboko|jĂŠsaljeboko]] || [[word:shĂŠsaljeboko|shĂŠsaljeboko]] || [[word:kĂŠsaljeboko|kĂŠsaljeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasaljeboko|thathasaljeboko]] || [[word:jajasaljeboko|jajasaljeboko]] || [[word:shashasaljeboko|shashasaljeboko]] || [[word:kakasaljeboko|kakasaljeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasaljeboko|thasaljeboko]] || [[word:jasaljeboko|jasaljeboko]] || [[word:shasaljeboko|shasaljeboko]] || [[word:kasaljeboko|kasaljeboko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasaljeboko|thasaljeboko]] || [[word:jasaljeboko|jasaljeboko]] || [[word:shasaljeboko|shasaljeboko]] || [[word:kasaljeboko|kasaljeboko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
